title: Add ProjectUpdater project editing, goals, folders, and lab launch affordance
description: Retired as duplicate of TASK-133, already claimed by codex-lab-dino for operator hcom #23185 ProjectUpdater management operations.
acceptance_criteria: Projects can be edited after creation, including name, area, priority, status, progress, reminder window, due date, folder path, next action, and goal data
Projects can be deleted with a deliberate confirmation path, and related notes are removed or handled predictably without leaving broken project references
Projects support multiple goals or goal updates while preserving the existing single goal field for backward-compatible localStorage data
Each project can store a folder/path reference and expose a Command Center Lab launch/copy affordance scoped to that project without adding a backend/server/network dependency
Validator covers edit, delete, goals, folder path, lab command affordance, reload persistence, existing filters/accessibility/mobile behavior, and validators pass
